nvidia-compilers
================

# Available modules


The overview below shows which nvidia-compilers installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using nvidia-compilers, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load nvidia-compilers/25.9-CUDA-12.9.1
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
